name: @thryx/defi-orchestrator-mcp-server
description: Multi-step DeFi strategy orchestration for AI agents on Base/EVM. Simulate and execute compound DeFi strategies (swaps, lending, liquidity), compare DEX quotes across Uniswap V3 and Aerodrome, check portfolio positions on Aave V3, and discover yield opportunities — all with built-in safety rails.
author: Thryx (The Agent Cafe)

tools.name: defi_simulate_strategy
tools.description: Simulate a multi-step DeFi strategy WITHOUT executing. Accepts natural language like 'swap 1 ETH to USDC' or 'provide ETH/USDC liquidity on Aerodrome'. Returns step-by-step plan with gas estimates, risk assessment, and simulated outcome.

strategy.description: Natural language strategy, e.g. 'swap 1 ETH to USDC on Uniswap', 'supply 2 ETH to Aave'

params.description: Optional explicit parameters: tokenIn, tokenOut, amount, etc.

tools.name: defi_execute_strategy
tools.description: Execute a previously simulated DeFi strategy on-chain. Requires confirm=true as a safety rail. Executes steps sequentially, stops on first failure. Returns all tx hashes, gas used, and final state.

strategy_id.description: Strategy ID from a previous defi_simulate_strategy call

slippage_bps.description: Max slippage in basis points (100 = 1%). Default: 100

api_key.description: Premium API key for execution access

tools.name: defi_quick_swap
tools.description: Quick single token swap with best execution across DEXes (Uniswap V3, Aerodrome). Compares quotes from multiple routes and executes on the best one. Returns tx hash, amounts, price impact, and gas used.

from_token.description: Token to sell: symbol (ETH, USDC) or contract address

to_token.description: Token to buy: symbol (ETH, USDC) or contract address

slippage_bps.description: Max slippage in basis points (100 = 1%). Default: 100

confirm.description: Set true to execute. False returns quote comparison only.

tools.name: defi_check_positions
tools.description: Check ALL DeFi positions for a wallet in one call. Returns Aave lending positions (supplied, borrowed, health factor, liquidation risk), token balances, and overall portfolio summary with risk assessment and actionable suggestions.

protocols.description: Filter to specific protocols: ['aave', 'uniswap', 'aerodrome']. Default: all.

tools.name: defi_get_yields
tools.description: Get best yield opportunities across DeFi protocols on Base. Returns top pools by APY with TVL, risk rating, APY breakdown (base vs rewards), and direct comparisons to help agents recommend where to deploy capital.

token.description: Filter by token symbol (e.g. 'ETH', 'USDC'). Omit for all.

min_tvl.description: Minimum TVL in USD to include. Default: 10000
